question: Count the number of teachers who have taught students who have never won an achievement.
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.teacher_id) FROM Teachers t JOIN Classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id WHERE c.student_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT student_id FROM Achievements);

back_translation.intent: 统计没有成就记录的学生对应的教师数量
filters: c.student_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT student_id FROM Achievements)

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题的意图，即统计那些没有成就记录的学生所对应的教师数量，且使用了正确的过滤条件和聚合函数。
